nation: Fort Good Hope Dene Community Council
one_time_description: Significantly higher ISC funding in 2024 ($2,327,008) vs prior year ($453,229), including large ISC Policy & Coordination Fixed Funding and Jordon's Principles contributions
economic_notes: Council owns 100% of K'asho Got'ine Development Corporation, which in turn owns 24.9% of Sahtu Dene Inn Limited Partnership. KGDC is a government not-for-profit pursuing community economic development. Auditors could not obtain Sahtu Dene Inn LP financials for year ended March 31, 2024, resulting in qualified opinion.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to inability to obtain Sahtu Dene Inn Limited Partnership financial statements for year ended March 31, 2024 - auditors could not determine if equity adjustments were necessary. K'asho Got'ine Development Corporation (100% owned) shows nil financial activity in Note 9 summary. Large deferred contributions balance of $1,951,900 at year end including $1,519,562 ISC Policy & Coordination Fixed Funding and $120,380 Daycare Repairs & Maintenance. Contributions repayable increased significantly to $278,139 including $254,305 ISC Jordon's Principles. Province coded as NT (Northwest Territories). Band administration expenses include $256,867 band administration plus $7,500 band governance = $264,367.
